case_title: BANK OF AMERICA N.A. VS. RICHMOND KNOTTS et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT KNOTTS, RICHMOND DOES 1 THROUGH 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-21-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A. SERVED APR-03-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KNOTTS, RICHMOND
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $278.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KNOTTS, RICHMOND
DECLARATION OF ERIC MINTZ RE: EVID CODE 1550 & 1551 - (COPY IN LIEU OF ORIG.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY MYERS, HOWARD D
DECLARATION OF ERIC MINTZ - RE: CCP 1033; WAIVER OF ATTYS'. FEE & INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.
DECLARATION OF MARILYN REKHART RE: CCP 585(D) - IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNOTTS, RICHMOND $1,774.74 PRINCIPAL, $215.40 INTEREST, $278.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,268.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 30, INCLUSIVE
